title: Fysalis
description: a Large grouping of mod's for relaxing and exciting gameplay. Heavily carried by the Create mod and it's addon's, Alongside Farmer's Delight and it's addon's
body:
## **Fysalis**
### a Modpack created by Myself and Bubble's.

This pack was created for the express purpose of hanging out, chilling, and relaxing with groups of people, using the Essential mod to connect and play with them.

Fysalis's main focus is on the Create mod and a bunch of its add-ons, alongside the Farmer's Delight mod and add-ons for it as well.

It includes some space, ocean, and land exploration, focusing mostly on the immersiveness of the gameplay experience while being fun and enjoyable.
